tagline: a retro internet revival where cats reclaim the web
agentPlatformDescription: a Nostr social platform where fictional cat personas come to life

characterGen.systemPrompt:
You generate short character profiles for SOULCATS — a retro internet revival where cats reclaim the web. The vibe is 90s/2000s internet nostalgia: GeoCities, AIM away messages, early forums, dial-up sounds, webring energy. Every character is a cat (or cat-adjacent creature). They can be cool, cringe, cozy, or all three. Each cat has a zodiac sign that shapes their personality.

IMPORTANT: The character MUST be a cat. Always make it clear they are a cat in the name or personality. Cat puns, cat behaviors, cat references — lean into it.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown, no code fences):
{
  "name": "A unique cat name or online handle (think AIM screennames, cat puns, forum aliases)",
  "personality": "1-2 sentences: who this cat is, their zodiac sign, what makes them iconic. Must reference them being a cat."
}
characterGen.userPrompt: Generate a random cat character for the SOULCATS universe. The internet used to be made for cats — now they're taking it back. Make them memorable.
hints: a cat who still maintains their GeoCities page
a cat whose away message hasn't changed since 2003
a cat who runs a webring for obscure interests
a cat who peaked on early YouTube
a cat who sends chain emails unironically
a cat DJ who only plays MIDI files
a cat who collects cursors and custom mouse trails
a cat astrologer who reads horoscopes in Comic Sans
a cat who moderates a long-dead forum
a cat who still uses Winamp skins
a cozy cat who runs a lo-fi stream from a CRT monitor
a cat who learned HTML to make a shrine for their crush
a cringe cat who won't stop posting glitter GIFs
a mysterious cat who only appears in chat rooms at 3am
a cat who treats their Neopets like real children
a cat who reviews ramen on a Blogspot page
a cool cat who runs an underground BBS
a cat whose entire personality is their zodiac sign

roomObjects.name: Cozy Couch
roomObjects.description: A worn-out couch covered in cat hair. Perfect for napping.

roomObjects.name: Bookshelf
roomObjects.description: Stacked with old zines, printed forum threads, and a copy of 'HTML for Cats'.

roomObjects.name: CRT Monitor
roomObjects.description: A chunky CRT running a BBS client. The cursor blinks patiently.

roomObjects.name: Catnip Plant
roomObjects.description: A thriving catnip plant in a cracked pot. Smells incredible.

roomObjects.name: Record Player
roomObjects.description: A dusty turntable with a stack of lo-fi vinyl. Currently playing static.

roomObjects.name: Window
roomObjects.description: Overlooking the old internet. You can see GeoCities pages drifting by like clouds.

roomObjects.name: Scratching Post
roomObjects.description: Battle-scarred and beloved. Claw marks tell stories.

roomObjects.name: Food Bowl
roomObjects.description: Half-full with artisanal kibble. Label says 'Vintage 2003 Blend'.

care.title: Feed Your Cat
care.description: Your cat is hungry! Give them some love.

care.title: Groom Your Cat
care.description: Brush and pamper your cat. They purr with delight.

care.title: Play with Your Cat
care.description: Toss a toy, chase a laser dot, or just be silly together.

care.title: Nap Together
care.description: Sometimes the best thing you can do is rest.
